request.details: Move appointment to June 24th around 3 in the afternoon with Dr. Lee

requests.details: Move appointment to June 24th around 3 in the afternoon with Dr. Lee

transcript: This is Robert Martinez, January 30, 1952. I need to move my appointment to June 24th around 3 in the afternoon with Dr. Lee. My insurance is United Healthcare and my number is 415-555-0174.
